enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Pogaadhe Kanmaniye?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional turmoil of separation.

What is the context of this song in the movie Veera?

In Veera, this song plays during a pivotal moment that showcases the protagonist's emotional struggle in love.

Who is the singer of Pogaadhe Kanmaniye?

The song is sung by Pradeep Kumar, known for his soulful voice and emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Pogaadhe Kanmaniye was composed by Leon James, who is recognized for his melodic compositions.

When was Pogaadhe Kanmaniye released?

The song was released on March 23, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Pogaadhe Kanmaniye is a heartfelt romantic song that encapsulates the emotions of love and longing experienced by the protagonist in the film Veera. The lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, convey a deep sense of yearning and affection, making it relatable to anyone who has faced similar feelings. Pradeep Kumar's soothing vocals enhance the song's emotional depth, while Leon James's composition adds a melodic richness that lingers in the listener's heart. This song beautifully portrays the complexities of love, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pogaadhe Kanmaniye from Veera is a mesmerizing romantic ballad that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Pradeep Kumar's soulful vocals and Na Muthukumar's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love. The enchanting composition by Leon James adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: I have loved you, I have loved you, I have loved you with my life.
I laughed with you, I enjoyed with you. I have loved your shadow too.
Don't go, my dear, don't go, my dear, don't go, if you leave, I will go away.
Your words and your smile, no matter what, my eyes won't let you go, my dear.
Don't go, my dear, don't go, my dear.
I have loved you, I have loved you, I have loved you with my life.
I laughed with you, I enjoyed with you. I have loved your shadow too.
My dear, come with me, I will protect you with my eyes. Whatever you see, I will take care of it.
Don't sleep... don't sleep... I enjoy your beauty, come and rest in my lap, the feelings that connect us are the visions.
Don't go, my dear, don't go, my dear, don't go, if you leave, I will go away.
Your words and your smile, no matter what, my eyes won't let you go, my dear.
I have loved you, I have loved you, I have loved you with my life.
I laughed with you, I enjoyed with you. I have loved your shadow too.
